personal.preferred_title: Senior Solutions Engineer | Cloud, Security, Observability & Enterprise Technical Advisory

summary: Senior enterprise technology consultant and solutions engineer with 20+ years of experience helping large organizations understand complex infrastructure, application performance, cloud data platforms, operational risk, and production reliability. Strong background in customer-facing technical advisory, executive communication, whiteboarding, dashboards, technical documentation, enterprise monitoring, AWS cloud patterns, containers, CI/CD concepts, identity/access awareness, and regulated environments. Experienced translating technical risk and operational telemetry into business-facing recommendations, guiding stakeholders through remediation priorities, and supporting technical teams with proof-style analysis, demonstrations, and repeatable delivery patterns.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Advised infrastructure, application, and leadership stakeholders on capacity risk, application telemetry, operational readiness, and cloud-oriented data platform patterns in a regulated banking environment.
Built automated Python/Pandas pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with repeatable, auditable visibility into operational risk.
Designed AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, Glue-based ETL, Athena-style lake access, Redshift analytics, EC2/ECS execution patterns, and containerized Python workloads.
Created executive-facing dashboards and reports that translated technical telemetry into utilization trends, capacity risks, operational bottlenecks, and actionable planning recommendations.
Supported secure, compliance-aware delivery through access awareness, data integrity controls, documentation, retention logic, and production troubleshooting discipline.
Worked cross-functionally with engineering, operations, application owners, and senior stakeholders to explain complex system behavior and drive practical remediation plans.
Used Docker, Git, CI/CD concepts, and repeatable automation patterns to support reliable data pipeline execution and operational workflows.
Documented technical architecture, support procedures, operating assumptions, and troubleshooting playbooks to improve team knowledge transfer and reduce support friction.
Used AI-assisted and agentic workflows to accelerate technical documentation, code review, structured analysis, and repeatable engineering artifacts.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as senior customer-facing subject matter expert for enterprise application performance monitoring across a large financial-services environment.
Supported 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, helping application and infrastructure teams understand observability gaps, performance risks, and remediation priorities.
Delivered technical guidance, dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, documentation, onboarding procedures, and training material for distributed technical teams.
Partnered with client application, infrastructure, WebLogic, and operations teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting transaction tracing, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, and production troubleshooting.
Led the FAST project, data-mining synthetic monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Presented technical findings and operational recommendations to engineering stakeholders based on real user and synthetic performance telemetry.
Supported AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, observability gaps, operational support needs, and production visibility requirements.
Maintained reporting continuity through Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 and TLS 1.2 security cutovers.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, throughput limits, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and production-readiness analysis.
Documented technical findings, performance baselines, risk indicators, and remediation recommendations for engineering release decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume.
Designed validation tooling and migration-readiness workflows to protect data integrity across high-volume relational systems.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Worked with relational database design, operational reliability, performance tuning, and risk mitigation for mission-critical transaction systems.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, C/C++, and UNIX scripting components for high-volume structured billing and reporting systems.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting and supported production troubleshooting, QA cycles, and release support.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Observability and Risk Reporting
projects.description: Built and supported monitoring, telemetry, and reporting workflows across large enterprise environments, translating operational signals into dashboards, risk indicators, and remediation recommendations.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic workflow using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers for semantic matching, scoring, structured artifacts, and quality gates.
